CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR# 9225. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-04-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Denied

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2007 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to plaintiff's counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No.4 (Administrative fee) is heard this day. No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is not re-set due to the proximity of the trial date. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long CSR# 8620. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Continued To Sep-20-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. The Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel only is ordered off calendar/Compliance. No apperance by Plaintiff's Counsel. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/20/2007 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR# 2031 (212)
